headline: Market structure analysis that reveals where you actually stand — and where you should be
description: We are specialists in the Rule of Three framework, a proven model for understanding how markets naturally organize into generalists and specialists. This isn't generic SWOT analysis — it's a rigorous lens that reveals whether you should compete on scale, differentiation, or niche depth, and what happens when you get it wrong.
proofPoints: Proprietary Rule of Three Checklist tool
Applied across automotive, manufacturing, financial services, and B2B services
Framework covers all 5 player types with strategic element mapping

headline: Top-tier strategy advisory quality without the enterprise overhead
description: We hold ourselves to the same analytical standards as Bain, BCG, and McKinsey — structured frameworks, evidence-based recommendations, board-ready deliverables. But as a focused boutique, we move faster, work more closely with your team, and adapt to your pace without the bureaucracy of a global firm.
proofPoints: Board-ready deliverables with full data backing
Co-creative model with direct partner involvement in every engagement

headline: Your strategy, built with you — not handed to you in a deck
description: We don't deliver strategy from an ivory tower. Every engagement is a co-creation process with regular check-ins, shared ownership of insights, and iterative refinement. We even put our fees on the line: if you're not satisfied, 15% stays in your pocket.
proofPoints: One round of feedback incorporated per deliverable

headline: We understand the Dutch mid-market because that's where we live
description: Strategic Popoltastic is purpose-built for Dutch mid-market and growth companies. We understand the specific dynamics — family-owned businesses scaling internationally, manufacturing companies navigating market consolidation, services firms finding their competitive edge in a market dominated by larger players.
proofPoints: Case portfolio spanning Dutch automotive, manufacturing, textiles, and business services
Framework specifically calibrated for mid-market positioning decisions

headline: Strategy that accounts for people, not just markets
description: With a founder background in Theology, Hermeneutics and Leadership, we bring a uniquely human lens to strategy. We understand that organizations are shaped by culture, relationships, and stories as much as by market forces. Our change management and cultural transformation expertise ensures strategies don't just look good on paper — they get adopted.
proofPoints: Certified DISC trainer and Perform Plus coach on every engagement
Cultural transformation experience with international banks
77% cultural alignment achieved in client organizations
